response.global_analysis: Vocal music identified as 'Ai Ai Ai Ai Love You' by Hololive 3rd Generation. Phonetics match the predicted lyrics from the on-screen text ('あいあいあいあいらぶゆー'). subtitles.original: あいあいあいあいらぶゆー
